complaints.address: Radial Road 3, Connaught Place, New Delhi - 110001
complaints.title: Severe Waterlogging & Broken Drainage
complaints.description: The sewage drain near Connaught Place Radial 3 is completely choked. Rainwater has pooled to almost 1.5 feet, making the road completely impassable and causing massive traffic jams. Immediate clearance of the main drain line is required.

complaints.address: Kartavya Path Near Gate 2, Central Secretariat, New Delhi - 110001
complaints.title: Hazardous Open High-Voltage Wire
complaints.description: A critical high-voltage electric wire is hanging barely 4 feet off the pavement right in front of the Central Secretariat Park gate. Extremely dangerous for children and morning walkers, especially in damp weather.

complaints.title: Illegal Garbage Dumping on Pavement
complaints.address: Mandi House Circle Lane, New Delhi - 110001
complaints.description: A massive pile of commercial garbage has been dumped illegally on the pedestrian walkway near Mandi House metro station. The stench is unbearable and it blocks the entire walking zone.
Huge structural pothole at the main traffic signal junction. It is causing vehicle damage and sudden braking leading to accidents.
complaints.title: Massive Potholes on Main Crossing
complaints.address: Padam Singh Road Crossroad, Karol Bagh, New Delhi - 110005

complaints.title: Broken Footpath
complaints.address: Sector 62, Noida, Dadri, Gautam Buddha Nagar, Uttar Pradesh, 201309, India

chatRooms.lastMessage: Sir, the water level is rising. Has any team been dispatched yet?
Officer, please look into this urgently. Children play here in the evening.
Complaint registered. Direct secure channel with district officer initialized.

chat_101.content: Hello, I reported this broken drain this morning. The water level is increasing due to the rains.
New Delhi District Control Room: Assigned to Connaught Place Division.
Hello Rahul, I have received the alert. Our ground team is wrapping up clearing another sector and will inspect CP radial 3 next.
Sir, the water level is rising. Has any team been dispatched yet?

chat_102.content: High-voltage wire is hanging extremely low. This needs immediate insulation or power cutoff.
Assigned to Power Distribution Dept, New Delhi division.
Officer, please look into this urgently. Children play here in the evening.
